tools.name: list_obligations
tools.description: List recurring US compliance / tax-filing obligations that commonly blindside small businesses and foreign-owned US LLCs (FinCEN BOI, IRS Form 5472, Delaware/WY/NV/CA franchise tax & annual reports, 1099 deadlines, etc.). Each item cites its official IRS/FinCEN/state source with the date it was last

tools.name: get_obligation
tools.description: Return full detail for a single obligation by id: what it is, who must file, the deadline, the penalty for missing it, and a link to the OFFICIAL government source with a dated 'verified as of'. INFORMATIONAL ONLY — not legal or tax advice.

tools.name: build_checklist
tools.description: Build a personalized list of likely recurring compliance obligations and their NEXT deadline dates from an entity profile (entity type + state + formation date + a few flags). Pure date arithmetic over officially-cited rules — NOT individualized legal or tax advice. Always verify against the cited s

tools.name: create_deadline_tracker
tools.description: Save an entity profile plus an email and/or webhook URL to receive FREE recurring reminders before each upcoming compliance deadline. Returns a manage id. INFORMATIONAL reminders only — not legal or tax advice.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: create_deadline_tracker · Private data: get_obligation · Public sink: create_deadline_tracker.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: create_deadline_tracker · Private data: get_obligation · Public sink: create_deadline_tracker

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
